item.title: Could a Dark Matter Planet Exist?
item.description: A look at whether planets made of dark matter are possible, based on current theories about how dark matter behaves in the universe.

media:content.media:title: Could a Dark Matter Planet Exist?
media:content.media:description: A look at whether planets made of dark matter are possible, based on current theories about how dark matter behaves in the universe.

item.title: How Many Galaxies Are There?
item.description: A look at current estimates of the number of galaxies in the observable universe and how scientists arrive at these figures.

media:content.media:title: How Many Galaxies Are There?
media:content.media:description: A look at current estimates of the number of galaxies in the observable universe and how scientists arrive at these figures.

item.title: Why You Can’t Divide by Zero
item.description: A simple explanation of why division by zero is undefined in mathematics and how it breaks the basic rules of arithmetic.

media:content.media:title: Why You Can’t Divide by Zero
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of why division by zero is undefined in mathematics and how it breaks the basic rules of arithmetic.

item.title: How Paleodetectors Could Find Dark Matter
item.description: An introduction to paleodetectors—ancient minerals that may record particle traces—and how they could help scientists search for dark matter.

media:content.media:title: How Paleodetectors Could Find Dark Matter
media:content.media:description: An introduction to paleodetectors—ancient minerals that may record particle traces—and how they could help scientists search for dark matter.

item.title: What Astrophysics Has Given Us
item.description: A look at how astrophysics has contributed to technologies and discoveries that influence everyday life and scientific progress.

media:content.media:title: What Astrophysics Has Given Us
media:content.media:description: A look at how astrophysics has contributed to technologies and discoveries that influence everyday life and scientific progress.

item.title: Could We Survive a Zombie Scenario?
item.description: A hypothetical look at how society might respond to a zombie-style outbreak, focusing on preparedness, public health, and logistics.

media:content.media:title: Could We Survive a Zombie Scenario?
media:content.media:description: A hypothetical look at how society might respond to a zombie-style outbreak, focusing on preparedness, public health, and logistics.

item.title: Is Dark Energy Changing Over Time?
item.description: A look at current research on dark energy and whether its effects on the universe’s expansion may evolve over time.

media:content.media:title: Is Dark Energy Changing Over Time?
media:content.media:description: A look at current research on dark energy and whether its effects on the universe’s expansion may evolve over time.

item.title: Exploring the Idea of Fate
item.description: A thoughtful look at the concept of fate, examining perspectives from philosophy, science, and everyday life.

media:content.media:title: Exploring the Idea of Fate
media:content.media:description: A thoughtful look at the concept of fate, examining perspectives from philosophy, science, and everyday life.

item.title: What is the Möbius Strip?
item.description: A simple explanation of the Möbius strip, a one-sided surface with unique properties studied in mathematics and geometry.

media:content.media:title: What is the Möbius Strip?
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of the Möbius strip, a one-sided surface with unique properties studied in mathematics and geometry.

item.title: What About Electric Rockets?
item.description: An overview of electric propulsion systems, explaining how they use electricity to accelerate particles and move spacecraft efficiently.

media:content.media:title: What About Electric Rockets?
media:content.media:description: An overview of electric propulsion systems, explaining how they use electricity to accelerate particles and move spacecraft efficiently.

item.title: What Happens Inside a Battery?
item.description: A simple explanation of how batteries store and release energy through chemical reactions that produce an electric current.

media:content.media:title: What Happens Inside a Battery?
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how batteries store and release energy through chemical reactions that produce an electric current.

item.title: How Empty Is Space?
item.description: A look at the vast emptiness of space, explaining how little matter exists between stars and galaxies despite the universe’s immense scale.

media:content.media:title: How Empty Is Space?
media:content.media:description: A look at the vast emptiness of space, explaining how little matter exists between stars and galaxies despite the universe’s immense scale.
